headline: HII Secures Aircraft Carrier and Amphibious Ship Support Contract
summary: Huntington Ingalls secures a nearly $417.7M Navy contract for aircraft carrier and amphibious ship elevator support, extending work through June 2031.

raw.headline: HII Secures Aircraft Carrier and Amphibious Ship Support Contract
raw.summary: Huntington Ingalls secures a nearly $417.7M Navy contract for aircraft carrier and amphibious ship elevator support, extending work through June 2031.

headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me. Admin has been ratcheting up pressure on defense contractors re: shareholder payouts. But Northrop Grumman increased their shareholder dividends by about 7% in May."

raw.headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me. Admin has been ratcheting up pressure on defense contractors re: shareholder payouts. But Northrop Grumman increased their shareholder dividends by about 7% in May."

headline: RTX: Raytheon Powers Growth While Valuation Caps Returns
summary: RTX delivers robust Q1 results with 21% adjusted EPS growth and a $271 billion backlog, underscoring multi-year revenue visibility. See why the stock is a Hold.

raw.headline: RTX: Raytheon Powers Growth While Valuation Caps Returns
raw.summary: RTX delivers robust Q1 results with 21% adjusted EPS growth and a $271 billion backlog, underscoring multi-year revenue visibility. See why the stock is a Hold.
